allow: Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./src/content/fixtures/courses/calculus-i.course.json'\); console.log\('Modules:'\); c.modules.forEach\(m => { console.log\('  -', m.id, ':', m.title\); m.lessons.forEach\(l => console.log\('     *', l.id, l.title, '\(' + l.sections.length + ' sections\)'\)\); }\); console.log\('Glossary:'\); c.glossary.forEach\(g => console.log\('  -', g.id, ':', g.term\)\); console.log\('Prereqs:', c.prerequisites\);")
